name: ThingsBoard - Postgres
tagline: ThingsBoard is an open-source IoT platform for data collection, processing, visualization, and device management. More details: https://thingsboard.io/
description:
ThingsBoard is an open-source IoT platform for data collection, processing, visualization, and device management. More details: https://thingsboard.io/


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  thingsboard-postgres:
    image: thingsboard/tb-postgres:3.2.2
    environment:
      TB_QUEUE_TYPE: in-memory
    volumes:
      - thingsboard-postgres-data:/data
      - thingsboard-postgres-logs:/var/log/thingsboard
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42122:9090
volumes:
  thingsboard-postgres-data: null
  thingsboard-postgres-logs: null
